nasb.text: and they may come to their senses and escape from the snare of the devil, having been held captive by him to do his will.

esv.text: and they may come to their senses and escape from the snare of the devil, after being captured by him to do his will.

cnv.text: 他們雖然曾經被魔鬼擄去，隨從他的意思而行，或許也能醒悟過來，脫離魔鬼的陷阱。

ccb.text: 让他们这些被魔鬼掳去、受其摆布的人能够醒悟过来，脱离魔鬼的网罗。

csbs.text: 这样，那些被魔鬼掳去、随从魔鬼意思的人，就能醒悟过来，脱离魔鬼的网罗。
